title: Lucknow、Uttar Pradesh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Lucknow、Uttar Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Lucknow是Uttar Pradesh的一個城市，人口約3,500,000。The capital of Uttar Pradesh, known for its Nawabi-era elegance, Mughal cuisine, intricate embroidery, and historic architecture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
